title: The harness has a rented half and an owned half
subtitle: The generic loop is becoming a line item you rent. The moat is the half that encodes your domain, and how fast you rebuild it when the model moves.
caption: Anthropic's Managed Agents now runs the loop, the sandbox, and the session log as a hosted service. The right column is the part no model release or hosted runtime ships with.

left.label: Rented · commoditizing
left.title: The generic loop
items: The agent loop that decides the next step
Now sold hosted: Managed Agents, $0.08 a session-hour

right.label: Owned · the moat
right.title: The part that encodes your domain
items: Your deploy gates and permission boundaries
Verification that knows what correct means in your product
The failure history the last three agents already hit
The skill of re-deriving it faster every time the model moves
